summary: Fixed critical bug: News not loading due to stale Metro cache containing wrong API_BASE_URL (cards-feed-demo instead of news-feed-eu). Cleared metro cache and restarted expo to apply fix. White rectangle issue on category selection NOT REPRODUCIBLE in web version - category cards show clean borders and checkmarks.

issues: User reported white rectangle issue - NOT REPRODUCIBLE in web. May be mobile APK-specific rendering issue.

action_items: VERIFY: White rectangle issue may only appear on native mobile APK - cannot reproduce on web
NOTE: Metro cache was stale - if issue reappears, clear cache: rm -rf .metro-cache node_modules/.cache .expo/web/cache
IMPORTANT: After any .env changes or code updates, restart expo: sudo supervisorctl restart expo
critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE FOUND: Metro bundler was caching old API_BASE_URL (cards-feed-demo.preview.emergentagent.com) instead of using the new value from .env (news-feed-eu.preview.emergentagent.com)
The frontend code correctly reads from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env variable, but metro cache was not invalidated
Category selection UI is clean - no white rectangle visible in web version screenshots

success_rate.frontend: 100% (news loading, category selection, tab filtering all working)

seed_data_creation: None - RSS feeds provide real-time news data
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Unable to load news' bug was caused by stale Metro cache containing wrong API URL. Fixed by clearing metro cache and restarting expo. Backend API is fully functional - returning 190+ articles. Category selection works correctly in web version - no white rectangle issue visible. The white rectangle issue reported by user may be mobile APK-specific and cannot be reproduced on web.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Metro bundler cache was stale and contained the wrong API_BASE_URL value (cards-feed-demo.preview.emergentagent.com). Even though .env had the correct value (news-feed-eu.preview.emergentagent.com), the cached bundle was making API calls to the wrong URL resulting in 404 errors.
reproduction_steps: 3. Frontend makes API call to wrong URL (https://cards-feed-demo.preview.emergentagent.com/api/news)
4. API returns 404 because that URL doesn't exist
mitigation: 2. Restarted expo: sudo supervisorctl restart expo
3. Frontend now correctly reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from .env and makes API calls to news-feed-eu.preview.emergentagent.com
4. API returns 200 OK with news articles

verified_features.category_selection: Working - clean UI, no white rectangle visible on web
verified_features.get_started_navigation: Working - navigates to home screen after selection
verified_features.news_loading: Working - API returns 200, articles display correctly
verified_features.tab_filtering: Working - My Feed, Politics, Business, Technology tabs all functional
verified_features.retry_button: Working - error state has functional retry button
